checklistName: Post PR233 Private Local Operation Continuity Check
operationPolicy: Private Local first; private-local.html, index.html, and local browser confirmation remain the operating basis after PR #233 main pull.
continuityPolicy: Home PC continuation proceeds only after PR #233 merged main, latest branch, and clean working tree are confirmed.
cleanMainPolicy: Phase21-39 starts from clean main before moving to the next Phase.
securitySoftwarePolicy: Norton and security-software friendly operation; no hidden updater, auto-run launcher, suspicious background execution, or dangerous launcher extension changes.
devicePolicy: Home PC continues stable private local operation; iPad remains view / confirmation only.
prMergePolicy: No direct commit to main; feature branch and Draft PR are required; merge only after user confirmation.
